company_name: Quality Pools & Spas by Dick Mackey

hero.headline: Northeast PA's Most Trusted Pool & Spa Experts
hero.subheadline: For over 50 years, Quality Pools & Spas has been the go-to destination for pools, hot tubs, chemicals, and expert service in the Scranton area. We match any local price and back it with five decades of hands-on knowledge.
checkmarks: Pools, spas, chemicals & service under one roof

services.label: What We Offer
services.headline: Your One-Stop Shop for Pools,<br class="hidden md:block">Spas & Everything In Between
services.subtitle: From brand-new pool installations to hot tub sales, water testing, and year-round service, Quality Pools & Spas has everything your backyard needs under one roof.

cards.title: Swimming Pool Sales & Installation
cards.description: Above-ground, in-ground, and on-ground pools from Doughboy, Embassy, San Juan Fiberglass, and Fort Wayne Pools. Expert installation for every pool type and yard.

cards.title: Hot Tubs & Spas
cards.description: Premium Cove Spas and Leisure's Edge hot tubs from compact models to luxury lines like the Columbia and Everest. Professional delivery and setup included.

cards.title: Pool & Spa Service and Repairs
cards.description: Pump repairs, equipment troubleshooting, liner replacements, and seasonal maintenance to keep your pool or spa running at peak performance year after year.

cards.title: Water Testing & Chemical Sales
cards.description: State-of-the-art computerized water testing lab with BAQUACIL, Poolife, Pool Frog, and Nature2 products for perfectly balanced, crystal-clear water.

cards.title: Pool Covers & Accessories
cards.description: Premium Loop-Loc safety covers, custom spa covers, and a full selection of pool accessories, cleaners, and supplies to protect your investment year-round.

cards.title: Financing Options
cards.description: Flexible financing to make pool and spa ownership accessible for every family. We help you bring your backyard dreams to life within your budget.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to Your Perfect Backyard

steps.title: Stop By or Call Us
steps.description: Visit our Chinchilla showroom or give us a call at (570) 586-9686. Our knowledgeable staff will help you explore your options and answer every question with zero pressure.

steps.title: We Find Your Perfect Fit
steps.description: Whether it is a pool, spa, or chemical system, we match you with the right product for your space and budget. Bring in a water sample and our computerized lab gives you a precise plan.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Backyard Oasis
steps.description: From professional installation to ongoing supplies and service, we are here for you for the life of your pool or spa. Over 50 years of experience means you are in the best hands in NEPA.

about.label: Why NEPA Trusts Us
about.headline: 50+ Years of Putting Families First — That Is the Mackey Difference
about.description: Dick Mackey started in the swimming pool industry in the late 1960s building in-ground pools in New Jersey. He relocated to Northeast Pennsylvania and opened the Chinchilla storefront in 1975 to better serve customers with maintenance supplies and equipment. Today, Quality Pools & Spas remains family-owned and operated, offering the same commitment to quality products at competitive prices that has earned the trust of thousands of NEPA families over five decades.

features.title: Price-Match Guarantee
features.description: Find a lower price within 10 miles? We will match it and give you 25% of the difference as store credit. You always get the best deal here.

features.title: Computerized Water Testing Lab
features.description: Our state-of-the-art testing lab analyzes your water sample and gives you a precise, personalized chemical recommendation — no guesswork, no overselling.

features.title: True One-Stop Shop
features.description: Pools, spas, chemicals, covers, accessories, and full service — all under one roof. No running around town. Everything you need is right here.

pricing.headline: The Best for Less — Guaranteed.
pricing.subtitle: We price-match any local competitor within 10 miles and give you 25% of the difference as store credit. Transparent pricing on pools, spas, chemicals, and service — no hidden fees.

guarantee.headline: Our Price-Match & Satisfaction Promise
guarantee.description: For over 50 years, we have built our reputation on giving NEPA families the best products at the best prices. If you find a lower price within 10 miles, we match it and give you 25% of the difference back as store credit. And if something is not right with your purchase or service, our team will make it right — that is the Mackey family promise.

faqs.question: What brands of pools do you carry?
faqs.answer: We are authorized dealers for Doughboy, Embassy, San Juan Fiberglass, and Fort Wayne Pools. Whether you want an above-ground, in-ground, or on-ground pool, we have a trusted brand and model to fit your yard and budget.

faqs.question: How does your price-match guarantee work?
faqs.answer: If you find an identical product at a lower price from a competitor within 10 miles, we will match that price and give you 25% of the difference as store credit. Just bring in the competitor's ad or quote.

faqs.question: Do you offer water testing services?
faqs.answer: Yes! Our computerized water testing lab provides precise analysis of your pool or spa water. Just bring in a sample and we will give you an exact chemical recommendation — no guesswork and no overselling. The test is quick and available anytime during store hours.

faqs.question: What hot tub brands do you sell?
faqs.answer: We carry Cove Spas and the full Leisure's Edge line including the GO Series, Columbia, Denali, and Everest models. From compact two-person spas to luxury full-size hot tubs, we have something for every space and budget.

faqs.question: Do you service and repair pools and spas?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Our experienced technicians handle pump repairs, equipment troubleshooting, liner replacements, and seasonal maintenance for all pool and spa brands. With over 50 years in the business, there is not much we have not seen and fixed.

testimonials.name: Satisfied Spa Customer
testimonials.text: Mr. Mackey spent a significant amount of time with us and was extremely knowledgeable about all aspects of the spas. He was able to answer any and all of my questions without hesitation. We purchased a luxury spa and could not be happier with the experience.

testimonials.name: Local Pool Owner
testimonials.text: Quality Pools has been our go-to for pool supplies and service for years. Their water testing lab is incredibly accurate and they always recommend exactly what we need — nothing more, nothing less.

testimonials.name: Northeast PA Homeowner
testimonials.text: Dick and his team helped us pick the perfect above-ground pool for our yard. The installation was smooth and professional, and they have been there for us whenever we have questions about maintenance.

contact.subtitle: Stop by our Chinchilla showroom, give us a call, or fill out the form below. Our team has been helping NEPA families enjoy their backyards for over 50 years — let us help yours next.
